languages.text: {n}Вас окружают километры полные {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}пластали{/g}, ферробетона и людей. Но вы все равно чувствуюте пристальный взгляд, провожающий вас до самой дальней точки системы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вас окружают километры полные {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}пластали{/g}, ферробетона и людей. Но вы все равно чувствуюте пристальный взгляд, провожающий вас до самой дальней точки системы.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You are surrounded by kilometres of {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasteel{/g}, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel them watching you, following you to the farthest point within the system.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вас окружают километры полные {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}пластали{/g}, ферробетона и людей. Но вы все равно чувствуюте пристальный взгляд, провожающий вас до самой дальней точки системы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You are surrounded by kilometres of {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasteel{/g}, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel the gaze following you to the farthest point in the system.{/n}

{n}You are surrounded by kilometres of {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasteel{/g}, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel them watching you, following you to the farthest point within the system.{/n}
{n}You are surrounded by kilometres of plasteel, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel the gaze following you to the farthest point in the system.{/n}

{n}You are surrounded by kilometres of {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasteel{/g}, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel them watching you, following you to the farthest point within the system.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたはキロメートルにわたるプラステール、フェロコンクリート、そして人間に囲まれています。でも、あなたはまだ、システムの最果てまであなたを追う視線を感じることができます。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are surrounded by kilometres of plasteel, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel the gaze following you to the farthest point in the system.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたはキロメートルにわたるプラステール、フェロコンクリート、そして人間に囲まれています。でも、あなたはまだ、システムの最果てまであなたを追う視線を感じることができます。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Te rodean kilómetros de {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plastiacero{/g}, ferrocemento y seres humanos, pero aún notas la mirada que te sigue hasta los confines del sistema.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are surrounded by kilometres of {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasteel{/g}, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel them watching you, following you to the farthest point within the system.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Te rodean kilómetros de {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plastiacero{/g}, ferrocemento y seres humanos, pero aún notas la mirada que te sigue hasta los confines del sistema.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你被数公里厚的{g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}塑钢{/g}、钢筋混凝土和无数人类包围着。可你依然能感受到他们在注视着你，一直追随着你，直至星系边缘。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are surrounded by kilometres of {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasteel{/g}, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel them watching you, following you to the farthest point within the system.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你被数公里厚的{g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}塑钢{/g}、钢筋混凝土和无数人类包围着。可你依然能感受到他们在注视着你，一直追随着你，直至星系边缘。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du bist von mehreren Kilometern {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}Plaststahl{/g}, Ferrobeton und unzähligen Menschen umgeben. Trotzdem spürst du ihre Blicke, die dich bis an den fernsten Punkt des Systems verfolgen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are surrounded by kilometres of {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasteel{/g}, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel them watching you, following you to the farthest point within the system.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du bist von mehreren Kilometern {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}Plaststahl{/g}, Ferrobeton und unzähligen Menschen umgeben. Trotzdem spürst du ihre Blicke, die dich bis an den fernsten Punkt des Systems verfolgen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Etrafın kilometrelerce {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasçelik{/g}, demirton ve insanla çevrili. Ancak o bakışın seni sistemin en uzak noktasına kadar takip ettiğini hâlâ hissedebiliyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are surrounded by kilometres of {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasteel{/g}, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel them watching you, following you to the farthest point within the system.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Etrafın kilometrelerce {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasçelik{/g}, demirton ve insanla çevrili. Ancak o bakışın seni sistemin en uzak noktasına kadar takip ettiğini hâlâ hissedebiliyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Malgré les kilomètres de {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plastacier{/g}, de ferrobéton et d'humains qui vous séparent, vous sentez encore le regard vous suivre depuis les confins du système.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are surrounded by kilometres of {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasteel{/g}, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel them watching you, following you to the farthest point within the system.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Malgré les kilomètres de {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plastacier{/g}, de ferrobéton et d'humains qui vous séparent, vous sentez encore le regard vous suivre depuis les confins du système.{/n}
